=====Pokémon competitions=====
[[File:Ash Goh Pokémon Catch Adventure Race trophy.png|thumb|250px|Goh after winning the Pokémon Catch Adventure Race with Ash]]
Goh has competed in the following {{cat|Pokémon competitions}}:
* [[Battle Frontier Flute Cup]] - Top 8 (''[[JN007|Serving Up the Flute Cup!]]'')
* [[Pokémon Iceberg Race]] - {{tt|N/A|Race cancelled}} (''[[JN008|The Sinnoh Iceberg Race!]]'')
* [[Magikarp High Jump Competition]] - Runner-Up (''[[JN026|Splash, Dash, and Smash for the Crown!]]'')
* [[Pokémon Grand Eating Contest]] - Winner (''[[JN047|Crowning the Chow Crusher!]]'')
* [[Castle of Chivalry]] Challenge - Winner (with {{Ash}}; ''[[JN056|Searching for Chivalry!]]'')
* [[Marine Athletic Race|Kids Marine Athletic Race]] - Unknown{{tt|*|Goh crossed the finish line at the same time as Ash, but his Dewgong was not with him}} (''[[JN063|On Land, In the Sea, and to the Future!]]'')
* [[Pokémon Catch Adventure Race]] - Winner (with Ash; ''[[JN076|All Out, All of the Time!]]'')
* [[All-Alcremie Decoration Challenge]] - DNF (''[[JN082|The Sweet Taste of Battle!]]'')
{{-}}
